boss_fight: ^In the end, you haven’t changed at all!
^Did you really just realize that you’ve been living on a whim this whole time?
^Yes, I’m trying to figure things out for once.
^I’m sorry for taking so long, okay?
^You know nothing of the world outside your studies. Let’s just go home.
^Don’t you want to at least, I don’t know—
^try looking at things face on? At people?
^Nothing good could come out of confessing to Kazumi.
^Why else do you think I’m trying to change?!
^…I want to know what that feels like.
^I don’t want to live it safe anymore.
